problem id: 64a72fd3
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(7) XOR NOT SHL(2)) OR SHR(4)

examples:
  00010111 -> 00101001
  00110100 -> 00110111
  10010001 -> 01111011
  10100101 -> 10111011
  10011010 -> 11011011
  11110100 -> 01011111
  10000001 -> 00111011
  01101000 -> 01101111

query: 01010000
predicted answer: 10010111
